inputs.name: --no-build
inputs.description: Skip the local build when artifacts are already prepared.

defaults.safeFailBehavior: Do not retry blindly; capture deploy evidence and stop for operator review.
defaults.rollbackBehavior: Use the deploy evidence pack and previous live artifact bundle to restore the last known-good portal.

lifecycle.retireWhen: Retire once live portal deploy is exposed as a native agent tool with built-in evidence and rollback.

entries.purpose: Deploy the live Monsoon Fire portal to the required Namecheap production path.

defaults.safeFailBehavior: Mark verification as failed and keep the mission blocked until evidence is reviewed.

lifecycle.retireWhen: Retire once Playwright smoke and visual verification are native runtime capabilities.

entries.purpose: Run the required portal smoke and visual verification lane against the live portal.

inputs.name: --deep
inputs.description: Run the deeper portal journey coverage profile.

entries.purpose: Run live website smoke verification without mutating the website deploy surface.
entries.safeFailBehavior: Keep the mission in verification-failed state and preserve the evidence artifacts.

lifecycle.retireWhen: Retire once website smoke coverage is available as a native verifier primitive.
